title: BTRUltima - Tensura
description: BTRUltima is an add-on for Tensura: Reincarnated that introduces new features and content not currently included in the main mod.
body:
# **BTRUltima**
Bonni's Tensura: Reincarnated Ultimates

BTRUltima is an add-on for Tensura: Reincarnated that introduces new features and content not currently included in the main mod.

### Informations will be over our discord: https://discord.gg/wEwNwa4Vmb

## Features


### The available Ultimate Skills:


Raphael, Lord of Wisdom

Beelzebuth, Lord of Gluttony

Azathoth, God of Void

Azazel, Fallen Angel

Veldora, Storm Dragon

Velgrynd, Scorch Dragon

Yaoyorozu, The Maiden

Timeless Memories

Azrael, Death Angel

True Hero, The Hero of Heroes

True Demon Lord, The Villain of Villains



### The available Unique Skills:


Sentient Being

Carnation

Tempter

Seeker

Analyst

Manufacturer

Time Letter

Chaos Ruler

Death Angel

Investigator


### The available Extra Skills:

 
Time Manipulation/Domination

Spacetime Manipulation/Domination



### The available Intrinsic Skills:


Tailed Beast




### The available Races:


Slime path (Serpent Slime - Serpent Zinnia)

Demon Lord path (Overlord - Ars Goetia - Deadly Sins - Fallen God)

Divine Human path (Transcendent - Supreme Ruler - Monarch - Sovereign)

Elf path( Elf Mage - Archmage - Immortal Elf)

Mystical Beast path - Kitsunes/Succubus/Hybrids



### The available Items:



Random Unique
Random Virtue
Random Sin
Random Config


Beast Essence
Frieren Staff
Azrael Blade
Wisdom Shard
Patience Shard
Justice Shard
Diligence Shard
Charity Shard
Chastity Shard
Hope Shard
Lust Shard
Greed Shard
Pride Shard
Envy Shard
Sloth Shard
Wrath Shard
Glutton Shard


### Important Notes

You do NOT need to manually modify your config files. The mod should configure itself automatically.
